candidates.title: Premium Nutritional Brand Packaging Designer Required
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · InDesign · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: **Project Title:** Power Sprinkle – Product Packaging & Brand Design (Nutrition Product) **Project Description:** We are looking for a talented and experienced Packaging & Brand Designer to design premium retail packaging for our nutrition brand **Power Sprinkle**. Power Sprinkle is a food-based nutritional fortification product designed for daily use by families, children, and health-conscious consumers. The product is positioned as a science-backed, preventive nutrition solution with a clean, trustworthy, and premium brand image. ### Scope of Work The selected freelancer will be responsible for: 1. Designing product packaging for: * Power Sprinkle Daily * Power Sprinkle Kids * Future product variants 2. Creating: * Front pack design * Side panels * Back panel layout * Nutrition information section * Product claims and benefits visualization * Icons and infographics * Print-ready artwor

candidates.title: Product Packaging Designer — Sealants Brand Launch (Logo Provided, Full Print-Ready Package Needed)
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price Hello, We're a Dubai-based B2B trading business launching our first private-label sealants brand, OBCO SealPro, in January 2027. The master logo has been designed and approved. We now need an experienced packaging designer to extend it into a complete print-production-ready package for three SKUs. This is a fixed-scope project with clear deliverables, an 8-week timeline, and a $2,000 budget (open to negotiation based on portfolio quality and proposed approach). WHAT WE NEED — 5 DELIVERABLES 1. MASTER LOGO SYSTEM & BRAND GUIDELINES Extend the supplied master logo into color variants, mono versions, reversed versions, and a horizontal lockup. Plus a 5–8 page PDF brand standards document covering logo usage, color codes (Pantone/CMYK/RGB/Hex), typography, and usage rules. 2. CARTRIDGE LABEL/SLEEVE ARTWORK — 2 SKUs Design wrap-around labels for two 600ml SKUs: MS Polymer

candidates.title: Premium Pet Care Packaging Design (Kaami Naturalz)
candidates.meta: Freelancer.com · $250–750 CAD · Ends in 6 days · 4-week timeline
candidates.tools: Illustrator · InDesign · Photoshop — Dielines, label design and botanical line-illustration in Illustrator; InDesign for print-ready files; Photoshop for 3D mockups.
candidates.brief: Design premium packaging for Kaami Naturalz, a plant-based pet grooming brand launching in Canada, featuring two products: KN-004 Neem & Aloe Shampoo (250ml bottle with pump or flip cap, full wrap label) and KN-006 Turmeric Paw Balm (50g glass or aluminium jar, lid label + side wrap). Design direction: premium Ayurvedic aesthetic (Forest Essentials meets Aesop). Palette: dark forest green base (#0D4A35), gold accents (#C9A84C), sage (#7A9E7E), cream (#F5EFE0). Botanical line illustrations of neem, turmeric, aloe. Typography: Cormorant Garamond headlines, DM Sans body. Deliverables: packaging dielines for both SKUs; front, back and side panel designs; lid design for the paw balm jar; botanical illustration (original or licensed); print-ready AI/PDF files (CMYK, 300 DPI minimum); 3D mockup renders; source files; up to 3 revision rounds. Requirements: portfolio showing premium CPG/cosmetic

candidates.title: Packaging/Graphic Designer for Label Conversion
candidates.brief: Upwork · Hourly we are looking for an experienced packaging / graphic designer to rebuild our existing Levanta product labels from PDFs into editable Adobe files (InDesign or Illustrator). Project scope: 49 products, many with 1–3 variants Different bottle and canister sizes Current labels are only available as PDFs; no source files exist Goal: Recreate the labels based on the existing design (no new design required) Clear content structure & layout improvements Make the files fully editable for future text adjustments Update text (german), add GHS symbols, and ensure CLP-compliance Tasks: Rebuild PDF labels in Adobe Illustrator or InDesign Apply provided texts, safety data sheets, H/P statements, barcodes, and images Ensure CLP-compliant layout Deliver editable, print-ready files (CMYK, with bleed) Provided by us: PDFs of all existing labels Updated texts Product images Barcodes Safety
